title: Form Handling in Vue.js Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of v-model, its modifiers (.lazy, .number, .trim), and custom input components in Vue 3.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primarily directive used for two-way data binding on form elements in Vue.js?
Which modifier would you use to sync an input's value only after the 'change' event instead of the 'input' event?
What is the result when using the .number modifier with v-model (v-model.number)?
options: It limits the input to numeric characters only.
It automatically casts the user's input string to a number.

questions.question: Which event modifier is commonly used to trim whitespace from user input?
In Vue 3, which and/or what is the default prop name for a custom component to support v-model?
